title: Intel's 18A Process Node - 288-Core Xeon
desc: Intel's breakthrough 18A process node powers a 288-core data center CPU with 12 DDR5 channels and Foveros 3D packaging technology.

title: Apple MacBook Pro with M5 Pro and M5 Max
desc: Apple unveils new MacBook Pro lineup featuring the latest M5 Pro and M5 Max chips with enhanced performance and efficiency.

title: GPT-5.3 Instant
desc: OpenAI releases GPT-5.3 Instant, featuring improved reasoning capabilities and faster response times for real-time applications.

title: Apple MacBook Air with M5
desc: The new MacBook Air arrives with Apple's M5 chip, delivering exceptional performance in an ultra-portable design.

title: Meta's AI Smart Glasses and Privacy Concerns
desc: Meta's AI-powered smart glasses raise data privacy concerns as workers report seeing everything through the devices.
